message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 169 progress comment

RusticMaple: WriteCommandSender::send_with_cx added. Closes root-
level orphan cx hole at the base of every storage _with_cx write
(~60+ methods routed through one send). Tick 136 event-annotation
cluster (6 methods) migrated as representative pattern. 496/496
storage tests pass.
